summary: Iteration 58 - Multi-batch fixes: CMS Settings toggles, Bundle features, Document upload, Paid slots. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for admin settings toggles, MentorshipCalendar template select, and BundlesBrowse/BundleDetail pages.

issues: Existing bundles don't have banner_url set - banners not displayed (expected for old data)

critical_code_review_comments: MentorshipProfile.js correctly uses stripHtml() for card display (line 62) and dangerouslySetInnerHTML for dialog (line 332)
bundles.py correctly handles summary and banner_url fields in _clean_bundle_body (lines 24-26)
paid_bundles_enabled gate implemented with fallback to mentor_slots_paid_enabled (lines 187-191)
MentorshipCalendar.js template select uses controlled state via appliedTemplateId - retains selected value correctly
seed_data_creation: Test bundles created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 58 features verified: (1) paid_bundles_enabled toggle works independently from mentor_slots_paid_enabled, (2) my_account_color_scheme radio works, (3) Bundle CRUD with summary/banner_url fields works, (4) Member bundle endpoints return summary/banner_url/mentor_name, (5) .docx upload works with both MIME types, (6) Paid mentorship checkout returns Stripe URL, (7) MentorshipCalendar template select retains value and pre-fills fields, (8) BundlesBrowse shows Read more links, (9) BundleDetail shows price/sessions/description. Note: MentorshipProfile HTML rendering fix verified in code - carlos@example.com has no mentor assigned so no slots to display.

backend: Admin toggle paid_bundles_enabled independently via PUT /api/admin/settings
POST /api/member/bundles/checkout/{id} returns Stripe URL when paid_bundles_enabled=true
Admin bundle CRUD (POST/PUT/GET/DELETE /api/admin/bundles) with summary and banner_url
GET /api/member/bundles returns list with summary and banner_url
GET /api/member/bundles/{id} returns full bundle with mentor_name
POST /api/member/upload-file accepts .docx with correct MIME type
frontend: Admin Settings → General shows mentor-slots-paid-toggle (data-testid verified)
Admin Settings → General shows paid-bundles-toggle (data-testid verified)
Admin Settings → General shows my-account-color-scheme radio (data-testid verified)
Admin Settings → General shows ma-scheme-dark and ma-scheme-light radios (data-testid verified)
MentorshipCalendar Add Slot dialog shows slot-apply-template select
MentorshipCalendar template select retains selected value after change
MentorshipCalendar template pre-fills Title, Virtual Link, Description fields
BundlesBrowse shows bundle cards with price, sessions, savings
BundleDetail shows price stat card, sessions stat card, description
